channel.title: GS MENA Conflict News Monitor
channel.description: Aggregated RSS from multiple Middle East sources.

item.title: Times of Israel | Saudi Arabia has told Iran to stop attacks, warned of possible retaliation, sources say
item.description: Times of Israel • Mar 08, 2026 04:06 UTC ———————————————— Tehran said to demanded US bases in region be closed and intelligence sharing with Washington stopped The post Saudi Arabia has told Iran to stop attacks, warned of possible retaliation, sources say appeared first on The Times of Israel . ———————————————— Read more: https://www.timesofisrael.com/saudi-arabia-has-told-iran-to-stop-attacks-warned-of-possible-retaliation-sources-say/

item.title: Middle East Eye | China says Iran war ‘should never have happened’, calls for end to hostilities
item.description: Middle East Eye • Mar 08, 2026 04:00 UTC ———————————————— China says Iran war ‘should never have happened’, calls for end to hostilities Chinese foreign minister Wang Yi on Sunday said that the ongoing US-Israeli military offensive against Iran should “never have happened” and called for an “immediate” end to hostilities. Speaking at a news conference in Beijing, Wang Yi said that force “will never resolve” the… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.middleeasteye.net/live-blog/live-blog-update/china-says-iran-war-should-never-have-happened-calls-end-hostilities

item.title: Middle East Eye | Over 1,300 killed in Iran, more than 100,000 displaced
item.description: Middle East Eye • Mar 08, 2026 03:47 UTC ———————————————— Over 1,300 killed in Iran, more than 100,000 displaced Iranian officials say more than 1,300 people have been killed since the US-Israeli war began, with thousands more reported wounded. The humanitarian toll continues to rise as air strikes and missile attacks intensify across the country. The war has also forced large numbers of civilians to flee their… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.middleeasteye.net/live-blog/live-blog-update/over-1300-killed-iran-un-says-100000-displaced

item.title: Times of Israel | After initially voicing support, Trump says he doesn’t want Kurds to enter Iran war
item.description: Times of Israel • Mar 08, 2026 03:45 UTC ———————————————— US president previously stated Kurdish invasion from Iraq would be 'wonderful,' but now says conflict 'complicated enough as it is'; believes Iran behind deadly strike on school The post After initially voicing support, Trump says he doesn’t want Kurds to enter Iran war appeared first on The Times of Israel . ———————————————— Read more: https://www.timesofisrael.com/after-initially-voicing-support-trump-says-he-doesnt-want-kurds-to-enter-iran-war/

item.title: Middle East Eye | Fire breaks out at Kuwait airport after drone attack, local media says
item.description: Middle East Eye • Mar 08, 2026 03:36 UTC ———————————————— Fire breaks out at Kuwait airport after drone attack, local media says Kuwaiti authorities on Sunday said a drone attack targeted fuel tanks at Kuwait International Airport, sparking a fire that firefighters were working to contain. The Kuwait News Agency reported that emergency teams were battling the blaze following the strike. Kuwait’s interior ministry… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.middleeasteye.net/live-blog/live-blog-update/fire-breaks-out-kuwait-airport-after-drone-attack-local-media-says

item.title: Middle East Eye | IRGC says new strikes launched on Israel, US targets in Kuwait
item.description: Middle East Eye • Mar 08, 2026 03:32 UTC ———————————————— IRGC says new strikes launched on Israel, US targets in Kuwait Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) said it launched a new wave of retaliatory strikes against Israeli and US targets in the Middle East, Press TV reported. Iranian state media reported that the attacks were part of what the IRGC described as the “27th wave of Operation True… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.middleeasteye.net/live-blog/live-blog-update/irgc-says-new-strikes-launched-israel-us-targets-kuwait

item.title: Middle East Eye | GCC: Stand with Bahrain and Kuwait in protecting their sovereignty
item.description: Middle East Eye • Mar 08, 2026 03:29 UTC ———————————————— GCC: Stand with Bahrain and Kuwait in protecting their sovereignty The Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) condemned what it described as Iranian attacks on Bahrain and Kuwait, calling them "dangerous acts of aggression" that threaten regional security and stability. In a statement posted on the GCC website, Secretary-General Jasem Mohamed Albudaiwi said the… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.middleeasteye.net/live-blog/live-blog-update/gcc-stand-bahrain-and-kuwait-protecting-their-sovereignty

item.title: Times of Israel | IDF says it hit key commanders of IRGC’s Quds Force in Beirut
item.description: Times of Israel • Mar 08, 2026 03:26 UTC ———————————————— Iran Guards say can fight ‘intense war’ for six months * 2 arrested for allegedly throwing ‘ignited’ devices at anti-Muslim protest in NYC The post IDF says it hit key commanders of IRGC’s Quds Force in Beirut appeared first on The Times of Israel . ———————————————— Read more: https://www.timesofisrael.com/liveblog-march-08-2026/

item.title: Al-Monitor | Australia weighing requests for assistance from countries attacked by Iran
item.description: Al-Monitor • Mar 08, 2026 03:01 UTC ———————————————— SYDNEY, March 8 (Reuters) - Australia's government said on Sunday it was considering requests to help protect countries attacked by Iran in the widening Middle East conflict, but reiterated it would not take part in any military operations in Iran. "We've had many countries, which are non participants, (that) have been attacked by Iran through this. You… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/03/australia-weighing-requests-assistance-countries-attacked-iran

item.title: Al-Monitor | Trump rejects settling Iran war, raises prospect of killing all its potential leaders
item.description: Al-Monitor • Mar 08, 2026 03:01 UTC ———————————————— By Maya Gebeily, Alexander Cornwell, Nandita Bose and Parisa Hafezi BEIRUT/MIAMI/TEL AVIV/DUBAI, March 8 (Reuters) - U.S. President Donald Trump said he is not interested in negotiating with Iran and raised the possibility that the Iran war would only end once Tehran no longer has a functioning military or any remaining leadership in power. Speaking to… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/03/trump-rejects-settling-iran-war-raises-prospect-killing-all-its-potential-leaders

item.title: Al-Monitor | Kuwait airport, Saudi Arabia targeted as Iran presses Gulf attacks
item.description: Al-Monitor • Mar 08, 2026 03:00 UTC ———————————————— Gulf nations reported on Sunday missiles and drone attacks, while Iran vowed to press on with strikes against neighbouring countries as the regional war entered its second week. Saudi Arabia, Qatar and Kuwait all reported new attacks, after loud explosions were heard in Dubai and Bahrain's Manama a day earlier. Kuwait's national oil company announced a… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/03/kuwait-airport-saudi-arabia-targeted-iran-presses-gulf-attacks-0

item.title: Al-Monitor | Lebanon says Israeli strike on Beirut hotel kills four
item.description: Al-Monitor • Mar 08, 2026 03:00 UTC ———————————————— Lebanon's health ministry said Sunday that an Israeli strike on a hotel in central Beirut killed at least four people, with Israel saying it had targeted commanders from Iran's Revolutionary Guards. Lebanon was drawn into the Middle East war on Monday, when Iran-backed militant group Hezbollah attacked Israel in response to the killing of Iranian supreme… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/03/lebanon-says-israeli-strike-beirut-hotel-kills-four

item.title: Middle East Eye | Blast at US Embassy in Norway damages entrance, local media says
item.description: Middle East Eye • Mar 08, 2026 02:48 UTC ———————————————— Blast at US Embassy in Norway damages entrance, local media says Norwegian police said an explosion occurred early Sunday at the consular entrance of the United States Embassy in Oslo, causing damage but no injuries, Verdens Gang reported . Police said they have an idea of what caused the explosion but declined to disclose details for investigative reasons.… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.middleeasteye.net/live-blog/live-blog-update/blast-us-embassy-damages-entrance-local-media-says

item.title: Middle East Eye | Report: Trump considering special forces option in Iran
item.description: Middle East Eye • Mar 08, 2026 02:42 UTC ———————————————— Report: Trump considering special forces option in Iran US President Donald Trump is considering options that could include deploying special forces to Iran to target key nuclear facilities, according to a report by the American news website Semafor. The report said US Central Command and Israel have developed plans for possible ground operations aimed at… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.middleeasteye.net/live-blog/live-blog-update/report-trump-considering-special-forces-option-iran

item.title: Middle East Eye | Protesters rally in Tunis in solidarity with Iran
item.description: Middle East Eye • Mar 08, 2026 02:22 UTC ———————————————— Protesters rally in Tunis in solidarity with Iran Anti-war protesters on Saturday gathered along Habib Bourguiba Avenue in central Tunis to demonstrate in solidarity with Iran amid the attacks by the United States and Israel. Demonstrators called for an end to the fighting and expressed opposition to the ongoing strikes. The war began after the United… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.middleeasteye.net/live-blog/live-blog-update/protesters-rally-tunis-solidarity-iran

item.title: Middle East Eye | Drone attacks in Saudi Arabia continue, Riyadh’s diplomatic quarter targeted
item.description: Middle East Eye • Mar 08, 2026 02:16 UTC ———————————————— Drone attacks in Saudi Arabia continue, Riyadh’s diplomatic quarter targeted Saudi Arabia’s defence ministry on Sunday said its forces foiled a drone attack targeting Riyadh’s diplomatic quarter. In a statement posted on X, the ministry said the drone was intercepted, adding that there was no damage or civilian injuries. Earlier, the ministry reported that… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.middleeasteye.net/live-blog/live-blog-update/drone-attacks-saudi-arabia-continue-riyadhs-diplomatic-quarter-targeted

item.title: Middle East Eye | Video: Oil depots ablaze after Israeli strikes in Iran
item.description: Middle East Eye • Mar 08, 2026 01:55 UTC ———————————————— Video: Oil depots ablaze after Israeli strikes in Iran Burning petroleum spread through nearby streets after Israeli attacks hit Iranian oil depots, with dramatic footage showing long strips of fire stretching along roads. The scenes emerged after massive explosions and massive fires erupted at the depots, with the burning petroleum spreading large plumes… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.middleeasteye.net/live-blog/live-blog-update/video-oil-depots-ablaze-after-israeli-strikes-iran

item.description: Middle East Eye • Mar 08, 2026 01:47 UTC ———————————————— Attack damages Kuwait social security headquarters Kuwait’s government on Sunday said the country’s Public Institution for Social Security was targeted in an attack that caused material damage to the main building. The announcement came as Kuwait’s Defence Ministry said the country was responding to a wave of air attacks and urged residents to follow safety… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.middleeasteye.net/live-blog/live-blog-update/attack-damages-kuwait-social-security-headquarters

item.title: Middle East Eye | Israeli strike on Beirut hotel kills four, Al Jazeera reports
item.description: Middle East Eye • Mar 08, 2026 01:36 UTC ———————————————— Israeli strike on Beirut hotel kills four, Al Jazeera reports At least four people were killed and 10 others wounded in an Israeli attack on a hotel in the Lebanese capital, Beirut, according to the country’s Health Ministry. Authorities said the casualties were reported after the attack hit the hotel in the city, Al Jazeera Arabic said, citing official… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.middleeasteye.net/live-blog/live-blog-update/israeli-strike-beirut-hotel-kills-four-al-jazeera-reports

item.title: Middle East Eye | IRGC claims kamikaze drone strike on US-operated oil tanker
item.description: Middle East Eye • Mar 08, 2026 01:33 UTC ———————————————— IRGC claims kamikaze drone strike on US-operated oil tanker Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) on Sunday said it targeted a US-operated oil tanker in the Persian Gulf with a kamikaze drone, Press TV reported. In a statement reported by Iranian media, the IRGC said the unmanned aircraft struck the tanker, identified as Louise P, with precision.… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.middleeasteye.net/live-blog/live-blog-update/irgc-claims-kamikaze-drone-strike-us-operated-oil-tanker

item.title: Al-Monitor | Why have 1,000 ships at times lost their GPS in the Mideast?
item.description: Al-Monitor • Mar 08, 2026 01:30 UTC ———————————————— The global positioning system (GPS) capabilities of cargo ships, oil tankers and other vessels stuck in the Middle East because of the widening war are likely worse than those in your cell phone. Experts say this deficiency explains why since the start of US-Israeli strikes, the jamming of satellite navigation signals has left about 1,000 ships in the Gulf… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/03/why-have-1000-ships-times-lost-their-gps-mideast

item.description: Times of Israel • Mar 08, 2026 01:19 UTC ———————————————— IRGC seen taking bigger role in strategy amid US-Israeli airstrikes that have killed top commanders; succession process being sped up; frontrunner Mojtaba Khamenei is untested The post Cracks emerge in Iran’s leadership as it reels under a war seen as existential appeared first on The Times of Israel . ———————————————— Read more: https://www.timesofisrael.com/cracks-emerge-in-irans-leadership-as-it-reels-under-a-war-seen-as-existential/

item.title: Middle East Eye | Loud explosion heard near US embassy in Norway
item.description: Middle East Eye • Mar 08, 2026 01:15 UTC ———————————————— Loud explosion heard near US embassy in Norway Norwegian police said a loud blast was heard near the United States embassy in the capital, Oslo, Al Jazeera reported. Smoke ​was ⁠seen rising from the area around the ​embassy compound, ​Norwegian ⁠daily Verdens Gang reported, quoting eyewitnesses. Authorities said it was not immediately clear what caused the… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.middleeasteye.net/live-blog/live-blog-update/loud-explosion-heard-near-us-embassy-norway

item.title: Middle East Eye | Report: Israeli strike hits ambulance in Tehran
item.description: Middle East Eye • Mar 08, 2026 00:21 UTC ———————————————— Report: Israeli strike hits ambulance in Tehran An ambulance was hit and destroyed in a reported Israeli strike in the Iranian capital, Tehran, Fars news agency said. Video shared by the outlet showed the vehicle engulfed in flames as an emergency responder attempted to extinguish the fire. The citizen journalism group Mamlekate also reported that an… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.middleeasteye.net/live-blog/live-blog-update/report-israeli-strike-hits-ambulance-tehran

item.title: Al-Monitor | Trump says school strike 'done by Iran
item.description: Al-Monitor • Mar 08, 2026 00:00 UTC ———————————————— President Donald Trump on Saturday blamed Iran for what the country's authorities said was a deadly strike on a school in the southern county of Minab. "We think it was done by Iran. Because they are very inaccurate, as you know, with their munitions. They have no accuracy whatsoever," Trump told reporters aboard Air Force One. According to Iranian… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/03/trump-says-school-strike-done-iran

item.description: Middle East Eye • Mar 07, 2026 23:59 UTC ———————————————— Trump suggests US troops could be sent to Iran US President Donald Trump evoked the idea of sending ground troops into Iran to secure the country's stockpiles of enriched uranium. "At some point maybe we will. That would be a great thing," he told reporters during a briefing aboard Air Force One. "We haven't gone after it but it's something we could do… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.middleeasteye.net/live-blog/live-blog-update/trump-suggests-us-troops-could-be-sent-secure-irans-uranium

item.title: Middle East Eye | Strike hits apartment in hotel building in central Beirut, security source says
item.description: Middle East Eye • Mar 07, 2026 23:56 UTC ———————————————— Strike hits apartment in hotel building in central Beirut, security source says A strike hit an apartment in a hotel building in central Beirut, a security source said early on Sunday. No further details were immediately available. ———————————————— Read more: https://www.middleeasteye.net/live-blog/live-blog-update/strike-hits-apartment-hotel-building-central-beirut-security-source-says

item.title: Al-Monitor | White House halts security bulletin warning of Iran-related threats
item.description: Al-Monitor • Mar 07, 2026 23:36 UTC ———————————————— By Nicole Jao, Ted Hesson and Nandita Bose NEW YORK, March 7 (Reuters) - The White House has halted, at least for now, a federal security bulletin warning of a heightened threat to the U.S. in light of the conflict in Iran, a Trump administration official told Reuters. ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/03/white-house-halts-security-bulletin-warning-iran-related-threats

item.title: Al-Monitor | Trump tells Britain he does not need its help to win Iran war
item.description: Al-Monitor • Mar 07, 2026 23:01 UTC ———————————————— By Costas Pitas and Andrew MacAskill March 7 (Reuters) - President Donald Trump said on Saturday that Britain is giving "serious thought" to sending two aircraft carriers to the Middle East, but added that the U.S. does not need them to win the war with Iran, in the latest clash between the military allies. Trump has repeatedly criticised British Prime… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/03/trump-tells-britain-he-does-not-need-its-help-win-iran-war

"We are… ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/03/turkey-warns-over-dangerous-bid-stir-civil-war-iran

item.description: Al-Monitor • Mar 07, 2026 21:36 UTC ———————————————— March 7 (Reuters) - Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy said on Saturday he had spoken to Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman about the situation in Iran and the Middle East and restated Kyiv's offer to help deal with Iranian drones. item.title: Al-Monitor | Analysis-One week into Iran war, the dangers for the US and Trump multiply
item.description: Al-Monitor • Mar 07, 2026 18:37 UTC ———————————————— By Matt Spetalnick and Andrea Shalal WASHINGTON, March 7 (Reuters) - One week into the U.S.-Israeli war against Iran that has plunged the Middle East into turmoil, President Donald Trump faces a growing list of risks and challenges that raise questions about whether he will be able to translate military successes into a clear geopolitical win. ———————————————— Read more: https://www.al-monitor.com/originals/2026/03/analysis-one-week-iran-war-dangers-us-and-trump-multiply
